name: devmgr-vendored-overlay
comment: Hand-maintained SBOM overlay for statically-linked / vendored / header-only dependencies that syft cannot see in the shipped binaries (they carry no package metadata once linked). merge-sbom.py folds these packages into the syft-generated SPDX document at release time. Keep this file and docs/DEPENDENCY-AUDIT.md in sync: every package here has a row there, and any version/license bump lands in both. Versions are the ones the release containers pin (sdbus-c++ via the Dockerfile --branch, the rest via vcpkg.json resolution captured in vcpkg_installed/**/vcpkg.spdx.json).

packages.name: sdbus-c++
packages.comment: Statically linked into devmgrd and devmgr (CLI). Built from source in Dockerfile / Dockerfile.fedora with BUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF, pinned to tag v2.3.1. LGPL-2.1 static-link obligation is met by publishing the full MIT source and the pinned build recipe, which lets a recipient relink — see docs/DEPENDENCY-AUDIT.md.

packages.name: ftxui
packages.comment: Statically linked into devmgr-tui. Resolved by vcpkg (vcpkg.json); version tracks vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/share/ftxui/vcpkg.spdx.json.

packages.name: spdlog
packages.comment: Statically linked into devmgrd (logging). Resolved by vcpkg.

packages.name: fmt
packages.comment: Transitive dependency of spdlog, statically linked into devmgrd. Resolved by vcpkg.

packages.name: nlohmann-json
packages.comment: Header-only, compiled into devmgrd and devmgr (snapshot/state JSON). Resolved by vcpkg (3.12.0#2).

packages.name: tl-expected
packages.comment: Header-only, compiled into the core error type used by every shipped binary. Resolved by vcpkg.

packages.name: devmgr-sha256
packages.comment: In-tree FIPS 180-4 SHA-256 (core/src/sha256.cpp + core/include/devmgr/core/sha256.hpp), used for snapshot content ids. Zero-dependency implementation under the project's own MIT license. The checksum above is of core/src/sha256.cpp; header sha256 is 1999616fa1b0c274fb15a7a2c913625a7e9dfceea925524a52da61a9fe21a424. Update both here and in docs/DEPENDENCY-AUDIT.md if the implementation changes.
